creator: zeising@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to jakub_lach from comment #18)

This error is because the modules are built with sources that does not match the kernel you are using.  Please make sure that sources in /usr/src/sys (or use SRCDIR to point to the correct sources) are the same sources as for the kernel you are currently running, when building drm-fbsd12.0-kmod and gpu-firmware-kmod.
